summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Housekeeping module completed. All 8 navigation tabs working (Réception, Direction, Gouvernante, Femme de chambre, Maintenance, Petit-déj, QR Codes, Satisfaction). Most UI interactions functional. Minor 401 authentication issue with 'Données démo' button and some API calls.

minor.issue: Returns 401 Unauthorized intermittently - token may be expiring or not being sent correctly from frontend
Returns 401 Unauthorized intermittently during Housekeeping module navigation

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Erreur lors de la création des données' due to 401 error - token not being sent correctly

issues: Inventory items show 'Lingerie 1er • Seuil' and 'Stock principal • Seuil' without actual item names - appears to be missing data labels

passed_tests: Navigation: All 8 tabs found and clickable (Réception, Direction, Gouvernante, Femme de chambre, Maintenance, Petit-déj, QR Codes, Satisfaction)
Réception View: KPIs displayed (15 Chambres, 3 Départs, 3 Recouches, 2 En cours, 9 Terminées, 1 À valider, 1 PDJ Inclus, 4 ETA urgents)
Réception View: All 5 filters present (Étage, Statut, Badge, Assignée, Source)
Réception View: Actualiser button clickable
Réception View: Search input functional - filters rooms correctly
Réception View: Checkbox selection working - select individual rooms and select-all
Réception View: Bulk assign button appears when rooms selected
Réception View: Bulk assign dialog opens with staff dropdown
Réception View: Room table displays 15 rooms with all columns
Direction View: KPIs displayed (60% Occupation, 3 Départs, 27% Propreté, 2 Maintenance)
Direction View: Room plan by floor (Étage 1, 2, 3) with room chips
Direction View: Alerts section showing '2 interventions urgentes'
Direction View: Navigation buttons (Centre de contrôle, Plan Chambres, Répartition, etc.)
Gouvernante View: 3 internal tabs (Validation, Équipe, Stocks) all clickable
Gouvernante View: Validation tab shows inspection cards with Refusée status
Gouvernante View: Équipe tab shows team supervision
Gouvernante View: Stocks tab shows inventory with progress bars
Femme de chambre View: Mobile view with 'Bonjour Sophie' greeting
Femme de chambre View: Scan QR button opens modal
Femme de chambre View: Scanner modal with room number input
Femme de chambre View: Shows 'Tout est fait! Aucune chambre assignée' when no tasks
Maintenance View: Mobile view with search and status filter
Maintenance View: Stats row (En attente, En cours, Résolu)
Petit-déj View: Mobile view with tabs (Cuisine, Livraison, Servis)
Petit-déj View: Stats row (À préparer, En cours, Servis)
QR Codes View: QR Manager loaded with 1 active QR code (Chambre 101)
QR Codes View: 'Créer un QR Code' button opens creation dialog
QR Codes View: Creation dialog has Type de zone, Nom, Numéro de chambre, Étage, Description fields
QR Codes View: QR types checkboxes (Housekeeping, Satisfaction)
QR Codes View: 'Génération en masse' button present
QR Codes View: QR card actions (Voir, Imprimer, Copy, Delete)
Satisfaction View: Stats cards (6 Réponses, 66.7% Taux satisfaction, 3.8 Note moyenne, 2 Tickets en attente)
Satisfaction View: 4 tabs (Général, Critères, Liens reviews, Escalade)
Satisfaction View: Seuil de satisfaction slider (set to 4)
Satisfaction View: Enregistrer button present
action_items: MEDIUM: Fix token handling for 'Données démo' button - ensure Authorization header is sent correctly on POST /api/housekeeping/hotels/{hotel_id}/seed
LOW: Investigate intermittent 401 on GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/rooms during Housekeeping navigation
LOW: Add proper item names to Gouvernante > Stocks inventory display
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 Housekeeping tabs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
InteractiveReceptionView.jsx has comprehensive checkbox selection and bulk assign functionality
Mobile views (Femme de chambre, Maintenance, Petit-déj) are well-designed with proper mobile UX
QRCodeManager.jsx has full CRUD functionality with batch generation
SatisfactionConfig.jsx has proper tabs for configuration (Général, Critères, Liens reviews, Escalade)
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed

success_rate.frontend: 95% (35/37 tests passed - 2 minor issues with auth token)

seed_data_creation: Demo data already present in database (15 rooms, inspections, QR codes, satisfaction config)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Housekeeping module fully tested. 8 tabs: Réception (room table with filters, checkboxes, bulk assign), Direction (KPIs, room plan, alerts), Gouvernante (Validation/Équipe/Stocks tabs), Femme de chambre (mobile view with QR scan), Maintenance (mobile tickets), Petit-déj (mobile breakfast orders), QR Codes (CRUD for QR codes), Satisfaction (config with 4 tabs). Minor 401 auth issue with 'Données démo' button. All data-testid attributes present for testing.
